event: Parisian street scene near Porte St. Denis
description: A bustling Parisian boulevard scene showing pedestrians walking along a wide sidewalk. Autumn trees with golden-yellow foliage line the street. Horse-drawn carriages and an omnibus move along the road. Classical Haussmann-style buildings with ornate facades rise on the right. The sky is pale blue with soft clouds. Figures in early 20th-century attire populate the scene. The painting has an impressionistic quality with loose brushwork and a warm, luminous palette.
